description: Create a Guix home service that manages Gas Town's Dolt SQL server as a user-level shepherd daemon with auto-start, Dolt global configuration, GT_TOWN environment variable, and Dolt server config file generation. 3 new files to create, 2 files to modify. Home-only for now (system service deferred). Key constraint: shepherd owns Dolt lifecycle (replaces gt dolt start/stop with herd start/stop gastown-dolt). config_global.json is seed-only (preserves Dolt's auto-generated server_uuid).
title: Guix Home Service for Gas Town
